prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical smartphone photo of a young woman NBA fan seated courtside in a packed basketball arena, framed waist-up in a close closeup. She has long natural dark brown hair with soft loose waves and volume, parted near the center, falling over her shoulders. Her face is intentionally covered by a large opaque rectangular privacy block in a muted brown skin-tone color, centered over the entire face. She wears a black fitted New York Knicks varsity jacket with shiny black leather sleeves, orange-and-blue striped collar trim, snap buttons, and a visible Knicks basketball logo patch on the left chest, over a fitted white tank top. Add a small gold pendant necklace at her collarbone and a subtle small earring. The background shows Madison Square Garden-style NBA game atmosphere: hardwood court visible to the left, basketball hoop and shot clock in the distance, dense arena crowd in dark seats, bright blue LED ribbon boards, scoreboard lights, and a visible Delta sign, all slightly out of focus with realistic depth of field. Lighting should be authentic indoor arena lighting with crisp phone-camera detail, natural contrast, slight wide-angle perspective, candid fan snapshot feeling, no glamour studio lighting, no extra text overlays, no watermark.
